columns.name: rowid
columns.description: SQLite row identifier used as stable export order and record id.

columns.name: channel
columns.description: YouTube channel id of the commenter.

columns.name: heart
columns.description: Whether the channel hearted the comment (boolean).

columns.name: replies
columns.description: Number of replies on the comment (integer).

columns.name: reply
columns.description: Whether this row is a reply (boolean).

columns.name: time
columns.description: Original relative time string from source (for example '2 years ago').

columns.name: time_parsed
columns.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) parsed from source metadata.

columns.name: responses
columns.description: Generated creator response text, if available.

assumptions_and_decisions: Rows are exported in ascending SQLite rowid order.
Boolean-like values (0/1/true/false/yes) are normalized to booleans.
Blank strings are normalized to null for text-like fields.
Votes are normalized to integers; K/M/B suffixes are expanded (for example 1.2K -> 1200).
Missing numeric-like fields are set to 0 for replies and votes.
